calendar.matters:
Motion Re Mandate
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bob Heimbaugh appearing in propria persona 922-5466, petition for writ of mandate
K. Scott Dickey, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY 554-4674, for respondent and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as amended -- PETITIONER ROBERT HEIMBAUGH'S petition for writ of Mandate -- denied without leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/JT-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Motion Re Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-30-2003 Continued To Oct-09-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bob Heimbaugh appearing in propria persona 922-5466, moving for writ of mandate
K. Scott Dickey, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY 554-4674, for defendant and opposing party

RULING:
Upon petitioner's request, the Court continued PETITIONER ROBERT HEIMBAUGH'S application for writ of Mandate to October 9, 2003, to allow Petitioner to file and serve his reply brief. (301/JLW/JT-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Motion Re Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-22-2003 Continued To Sep-30-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Robert A. Heimbaugh, pro per petitioner/moving party.
K. Scott Dickey, Esq., 554-4674, for respondent/opposing party Dept. of Elections and John Arntz.
